title: Enhanced PVP
description: This mod adds new and unique items to the Minecraft PVP experience (also there are some troll items XD).
body:
**Look at gallery images to learn how to obtain items.**



A **Butterfly Booster** lets you leap through the air in any direction you are looking.  In order to balance it, it breaks after you use it, and cannot stack.

A **Health Pack** is an item that heals you a LOT.  It gives you Regeneration VIII (8) for four seconds, which brings your health up to 100% in half a second and lets you heal out almost any attack.  It also gives you Absorption IV (4) for 50 seconds, which gives you eight extra hearts (16 hp).  To balance it, it has a relatively long cooldown, and has a 1/25 chance to break on use.  It cannot be stacked.

**Jerky** is a new food item that you can eat almost instantly, and has about a one-in-three chance to give you Strength I for 25 seconds.

The **Web Fling** is a throwable projectile (similar to a snowball) that places webs down on the block it hits.  It is extremely helpful in PVP situations, as you can trap your enemy and then attack them while they are stuck in webs.

**Spontaneous Combustion Vessels** have five tiers: **[Normal], Packed, Compressed, Dense,** and **Concentrated**.  They each have a different blast power, with the normal one having a very small radius, and the **Concentrated** one having enogh power to 1-shot a player in max-prot netherite.  If you don't want you bases getting griefed by this, there is a Gamerule you can disable to prevent the **Spontaneous Combustion Vessels** from breaking Blocks.

The **Totem of Dying** is an item that kills you when you hold it.  You might not think it is helpful, but if your friend is AFK* and has an empty slot...

There are some others, but they are not obtainable in survival yet.  You can find them in the Creative Menu, and they are pretty intuitive to use.

**Have Fun!!!**


*I am not responsible for any ruined friendships
